mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO userNo , USER_ID userId , USER_NAME userName , EMAIL , ENROLL_DATE enrollDate , MODIFY_DATE modifyDate , STATUS FROM WEB_MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_PWD = #{userPwd} AND STATUS = 'N'
SELECT USER_NO , USER_ID , USER_NAME , EMAIL , ENROLL_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , STATUS FROM WEB_MEMBER WHERE USER_NO = #{ userNo } AND STATUS = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE WEB_MEMBER SET STATUS = 'Y' , MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND USER_PWD = #{ userPwd } AND STATUS = 'N'
